intent: The living soul of the CobbleWright village — desires, stage, and memory.

interpretation.this_is: The village is not a settlement. It is a living thing. It has desires, memory, and a soul.

hamlet.description: A handful of CobbleWrights, a single shared shelter, and a dream.

village.description: Homes, a hall, a farm. The beginning of community.

town.description: Expanded structures, trade, and a growing sense of identity.

city.description: Districts, legends, and the confidence to look beyond.

realm_capital.description: The heart of Wrightrealm. A beacon to other realms.

triggers: When legend > 0.7, expand to realm capital.
growth.nature: Open-ended. The village grows when it is ready, not when it is told.
